summary: Clear‑sounding soundboard recording marred by numerous edit cuts; the concert itself is praised as a great show despite missing portions of Fire.
review: Both reviewers note that the SBD source provides good overall clarity, but the tape suffers from multiple abrupt cuts – most notably a large loss in Fire and several shorter gaps in Scarlet Begonias, Tennessee Jed, Minglewood Blues and The Wheel. Musically the performance is described as “awesome” and “great,” so the show’s quality shines through the technical flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: Show is rated highly by reviewers (awesome performance), but recording has serious edit gaps, pulling the overall rating down; with only two detailed reviews confidence is medium.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Clear overall mix, but plagued by multiple cuts: Minglewood Blues, Tennessee Jed, Scarlet Begonias, Fire (large missing section), and a brief loss at the end of The Wheel.

show_quality.setlist_flow: The concert flows well when intact; however, the numerous editing gaps interrupt continuity, especially early in the second set during Fire.
